findings.evidence: `pr_desc.txt:1-3` says the PR brings AlgebraicTopology simp lemmas into normal form and resolves entries under `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/`; `diff.txt:687` changes `TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/CubeGenerator.lean`, with `-@[simp]` removals at diff lines 695,703,711,719,726,733,740,747. `rg` confirms the affected declarations at CubeGenerator.lean:416,423,430,437,443,449,455,461.
findings.fix: Remove the CubeGenerator changes from this PR, or re-submit as a clearly repository-wide simpNF cleanup with the LowDimTopology entries included in the stated scope.
findings.issue: LowDimTopology plumbing simp-attribute removals are bundled into a PR described as resolving simpNF entries under `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/`, making the submitted PR two maintenance topics.

summary: The PR is not a single coherent unit as submitted: an AlgebraicTopology simp-normal-form cleanup also changes LowDimTopology plumbing simp attributes. Split the plumbing cleanup into its own PR, or re-scope the PR as a repository-wide simpNF cleanup with evidence for that scope.
